summary: The classification of habits into intentional and unintentional stems from theories emphasizing volition and automated responses influenced by environment and prior experience. Option D (“Finn and Sim”) aligns most closely with established models that distinguish between deliberate intentions and unconscious/automatic routines within behavioral psychology.
